CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days that LoggerNotificationDelivery__c records generated by this rule are retained before LogBatchPurger deletes them. Defaults to 7 - typically shorter than the parent Days to Retain Matches so callout / HTTP request + response payloads clear out sooner while the match records stick around for auditing. Set to null to retain delivery records forever (RetentionDate__c stays blank on those records so the purger ignores them).
CustomField.label: Days to Retain Deliveries
